description: Validate the steward default handoff stays non-inheriting while explicit bound handles remain available when requested.
command: cargo test -p alan-runtime runtime::child_agents::tests::spawn_child_runtime_defaults_to_exec_like_non_inheritance --lib -- --exact && cargo test -p alan-runtime runtime::child_agents::tests::spawn_child_runtime_binds_requested_parent_handles --lib -- --exact
assertions: default child launches omit parent conversation, plan, and tool-result snapshots
explicit handle requests project bounded parent context into the child prompt
steward handoff shape stays opt-in rather than ambient inheritance
